name: Shiranui Style Synthesis
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>陣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Once per turn, if you control no monsters: You can send 1 card from your hand to the Graveyard, then activate 1 of these effects.
● Target 1 Zombie-Type monster with 0 DEF in your Graveyard; Special Summon it.
● Target 1 of your banished Zombie-Type monsters with 0 DEF; return it to the Graveyard.
You can only activate 1 "Shiranui Style Synthesis" per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
